steps.cmd: sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip python3-venv python3-dev libpq-dev build-essential

if (Test-Path 'C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310') {$env:Path += ';C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python310'; Write-Output 'Python path added to PATH.' } else { Write-Output 'Python not found, skipping environment change.' }
sudo systemctl stop apt-daily.timer apt-daily-upgrade.timer unattended-upgrades.service apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service
sudo systemctl kill --kill-who=all apt-daily.service apt-daily-upgrade.service unattended-upgrades.service
sudo systemctl mask sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target
sudo apt-get install -y ca-certificates apt-transport-https software-properties-common gnupg2 lsb-release
sudo systemctl unmask sleep.target suspend.target hibernate.target hybrid-sleep.target
sudo apt-cache search postgresql | grep postgresql
sudo -u postgres env PGPASSWORD='First#1234' psql -c "ALTER USER postgres PASSWORD 'First#1234';"

steps.arguments: = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $lnk = Join-Path $Env:ProgramData 'Microsoft\Windows\Start Menu\Programs\pgAdmin 4.lnk'; $sc = $s.CreateShortcut($lnk); $sc.TargetPath = 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\pgAdmin 4\runtime\pgAdmin4.exe'; $sc.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\pgAdmin 4'; $sc.Save()

steps.cmd: try { Start-Service postgresql-x64-17 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { Write-Output "Service failed, trying pg_ctl..."; & "$Env:POSTGRESQL_HOME\bin\pg_ctl.exe" start -D "$Env:POSTGRESQL_HOME\data" }

steps.arguments: (-not (Get-NetFirewallRule -Name 'OpenSSH-Server-In-TCP' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) { New-NetFirewallRule -Name 'OpenSSH-Server-In-TCP' -DisplayName 'OpenSSH SSH Server (sshd)' -Enabled True -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -Action Allow -LocalPort 22 }

steps.cmd: if (Test-Path 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf') { (Get-Content 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf') | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^\s*bind\s+127\.0\.0\.1') { 'bind 0.0.0.0' } elseif ($_ -match '^\s*protected-mode\s+yes') { 'protected-mode no' } else { $_ } } | Set-Content 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf' } else { Write-Host 'Redis config not found, skipping.' }

$serviceName = 'lntds-icmp-adapter'; $xmlPath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\adapters\icmp-adapter\icmp-adapter.xml'; $exePath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\bin\win\microservice.exe'; if ((Test-Path $exePath) -and (Test-Path $xmlPath)) { $service = Get-Service -Name $serviceName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $service) { Start-Process $exePath -ArgumentList "install $xmlPath" -NoNewWindow -Wait; Write-Host 'icmp-adapter installed.'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; $service = Get-Service -Name $serviceName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($service.Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Process $exePath -ArgumentList "start $xmlPath" -NoNewWindow; Write-Host 'icmp-adapter started.' } else { Write-Host 'icmp-adapter already running, skipping.' } } else { Write-Host 'Executable or XML not found, skipping.' }

if (Test-Path 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf') { (Get-Content 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf') | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^\s*bind\s+127\.0\.0\.1') { 'bind 0.0.0.0' } elseif ($_ -match '^\s*protected-mode\s+yes') { 'protected-mode no' } else { $_ } } | Set-Content 'C:\Softwares\redis\redis.windows.conf' } else { Write-Host 'Redis config not found, skipping.' }

steps.arguments: cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c py -m pip install --upgrade pip && py -m pip install -r requirements.txt' -WorkingDirectory 'C:\SPARK_PPC\adapters\modbus-adapters\src' -Wait -WindowStyle Hidden
cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c py -m pip install psycopg2-binary' -Wait -WindowStyle Hidden
cmd.exe -ArgumentList '/c py -m pip install psycopg' -Wait -WindowStyle Hidden

steps.cmd: bash -c 'if [ -d /home/ppc/SPARK_PPC/RTE/unix/bin ]; then chmod +x stop-core.sh; else echo "[SKIPPED] Folder not found"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -d /home/ppc/SPARK_PPC/RTE/unix/bin ]; then ./stop-core.sh; else echo "[SKIPPED] Folder not found"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -d /home/ppc/SPARK_PPC/SettingsReader/unix/bin ]; then chmod +x stop-sr.sh; else echo "[SKIPPED] Folder not found"; fi'
bash -c 'if [ -d /home/ppc/SPARK_PPC/SettingsReader/unix/bin ]; then ./stop-sr.sh; else echo "[SKIPPED] Folder not found"; fi'
sudo find /home/ppc/SPARK_PPC \( -type d -name logs -prune \) -o \( -type f -exec dos2unix -q {} \; \)
sudo apt-get install python3-pip libpq-dev python3-dev -y

$xmlPath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\win-services_hmi\analogdataprocessor.xml'; $exePath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\bin\win\microservice.exe'; $alreadyRunning = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -ieq 'microservice.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match [regex]::Escape($xmlPath) }; if ($alreadyRunning) { Write-Host 'analogdataprocessor is already running, skipping.' } elseif ((Test-Path $exePath) -and (Test-Path $xmlPath)) { Start-Process $exePath -ArgumentList "start $xmlPath" -NoNewWindow; Write-Host 'analogdataprocessor started.' } else { Write-Host 'Executable or XML not found, skipping.' }

$xmlPath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\win-services_hmi\discretedataprocessor.xml'; $exePath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\bin\win\microservice.exe'; $alreadyRunning = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -ieq 'microservice.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match [regex]::Escape($xmlPath) }; if ($alreadyRunning) { Write-Host 'discretedataprocessor already running, skipping.' } elseif ((Test-Path $exePath) -and (Test-Path $xmlPath)) { Start-Process $exePath -ArgumentList "start $xmlPath" -NoNewWindow; Write-Host 'discretedataprocessor started.' } else { Write-Host 'Executable or XML not found, skipping.' }

$xmlPath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\win-services_hmi\historian-filetransfer.xml'; $exePath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\bin\win\microservice.exe'; $alreadyRunning = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -ieq 'microservice.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match [regex]::Escape($xmlPath) }; if ($alreadyRunning) { Write-Host 'historian-filetransfer already running, skipping.' } elseif ((Test-Path $exePath) -and (Test-Path $xmlPath)) { Start-Process $exePath -ArgumentList "start $xmlPath" -NoNewWindow; Write-Host 'historian-filetransfer started.' } else { Write-Host 'Executable or XML not found, skipping.' }
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\SPARK_PPC\data\analog' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\SPARK_PPC\data\discrete' -Force | Out-Null

[System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('JAVA_HOME', 'C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17', 'Machine'); [System.Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable('PPC_MICROSERVICES_HOME', 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\lib', 'Machine'); $env:JAVA_HOME='C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17'; $env:PPC_MICROSERVICES_HOME='C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\lib'; Write-Host 'JAVA_HOME and PPC_MICROSERVICES_HOME configured successfully.'

$serviceName = 'lntds-archive-fileprocess'; $xmlPath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\win-services\archive-fileprocess.xml'; $exePath = 'C:\SPARK_PPC\Microservices\bin\win\microservice.exe'; if ((Test-Path $exePath) -and (Test-Path $xmlPath)) { $service = Get-Service -Name $serviceName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $service) { & $exePath install $xmlPath; Write-Host 'archive-fileprocess installed.'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 }; $service = Get-Service -Name $serviceName -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($service.Status -ne 'Running') { & $exePath start $xmlPath; Write-Host 'archive-fileprocess started.' } else { Write-Host 'archive-fileprocess already running, skipping.' } } else { Write-Host 'Executable or XML not found, skipping.' }

New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\archival\data' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\archival\data_processed\processed' -Force | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'C:\archival\data_processed\unprocessed' -Force | Out-Null
